name: minimax-cli
description: CLI for the MiniMax API Platform (Token Plan)

scripts.build:npm: bun build src/main.ts --outfile dist/minimax.mjs --target node --define "process.env.CLI_VERSION='$npm_package_version'" && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/minimax.mjs > dist/tmp && mv dist/tmp dist/minimax.mjs && chmod +x dist/minimax.mjs
